final_text:
{
  "project_name": "Cricket Worldcup Management System",
  "business_summary": "Manage and organize the Cricket Worldcup events, teams, players, and matches.",
  "actors": ["Admin", "Team Manager", "Player", "Fan"],
  "functional_requirements": [
    "User authentication and authorization",
    "Event management",
    "Team and player management",
    "Match scheduling and results",
    "Fan engagement and notifications"
  ],
  "non_functional_requirements": [
    "High availability",
    "Scalability",
    "Security",
    "Performance"
  ],
  "technology_stack": {
    "frontend": "React",
    "backend": "Node.js",
    "database": "MongoDB",
    "cloud": "AWS"
  },
  "architecture_pattern": "Microservices",
  "modules": [
    "Authentication",
    "Event Management",
    "Team Management",
    "Match Management",
    "Notification"
  ],
  "entities": ["User", "Event", "Team", "Player", "Match"],
  "apis": ["RESTful APIs for all modules"],
  "integrations": ["Third-party services for payments and notifications"],
  "security": {
    "authentication": "OAuth",
    "data_transmission": "HTTPS",
    "sensitive_data": "encryption"
  },
  "developer_handoff": ["API documentation and code repository"],
  "qa_handoff": ["Test cases and environment setup"],
  "deployment_handoff": ["CI/CD pipeline and deployment scripts"]
}
